reset_biology_synthesis.recommendation: Reset Biology suggests asking the prescribing practitioner to weigh the older dated protocol evidence against the newer library-site caution: Hunter (2026-04-18, E7GPNidicqY 01:49:46.120, https://youtu.be/E7GPNidicqY) says, "I would just do 10 to 20 mg per day, 5 days on, 2 days off for 8 weeks," while the newer Hunter Williams library video (2026-04-30, the-next-big-things-in-biohacking-emf-peptides-and-superhuman-performance-with-a--7d747dd0 1:12:58, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/the-next-big-things-in-biohacking-emf-peptides-and-superhuman-performance-with-a--7d747dd0/) says people "probably could try the Lyopholized bottles and take 15 or 20 milligrams." The newer library video also says, "guys, guys you don't need, 10 mLs of cerebrolysin every day for 30 days" (2026-04-30, the-next-big-things-in-biohacking-emf-peptides-and-superhuman-performance-with-a--7d747dd0 1:14:36, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/the-next-big-things-in-biohacking-emf-peptides-and-superhuman-performance-with-a--7d747dd0/).
reset_biology_synthesis.caveats:
- Newer library-site handling warning: a speaker says, "You don't want to put cerebral lysine using the fridge. We'll cause some denaturing" and "once it goes cloudy, you tend to get immune responses using the nature of the proteins" (2026-04-30, the-next-big-things-in-biohacking-emf-peptides-and-superhuman-performance-with-a--7d747dd0 1:14:06, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/the-next-big-things-in-biohacking-emf-peptides-and-superhuman-performance-with-a--7d747dd0/); the next cue says, "that causes some kind a flare up immune wise" (2026-04-30, the-next-big-things-in-biohacking-emf-peptides-and-superhuman-performance-with-a--7d747dd0 1:14:36, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/the-next-big-things-in-biohacking-emf-peptides-and-superhuman-performance-with-a--7d747dd0/).
- Newer library-site ceiling/caution: "guys, guys you don't need, 10 mLs of cerebrolysin every day for 30 days" (2026-04-30, the-next-big-things-in-biohacking-emf-peptides-and-superhuman-performance-with-a--7d747dd0 1:14:36, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/the-next-big-things-in-biohacking-emf-peptides-and-superhuman-performance-with-a--7d747dd0/).
- Hunter does not validate nebulization: "There probably have been people that have nebulized Cerebrolysin. I just wouldn't know how to go about doing that. Nor do I know how effective it would actually be" (2026-04-18, E7GPNidicqY 00:47:49.640, https://youtu.be/E7GPNidicqY).
- Taylor's dated first-line frame: "to be hormone optimization. Yeah. That'll be your the first line of defense" (2026-03-14, JC1poI1OEog 00:48:15.240, https://youtu.be/JC1poI1OEog).
reset_biology_synthesis.cross_expert_consensus: Taylor: "cerebrolysin would be the gold standard for for nootropics" (2026-03-14, JC1poI1OEog 00:48:20.880, https://youtu.be/JC1poI1OEog). Trevor: "It's a neurotrophic factor concentrate. It's the most powerful agent on the planet for promoting neurogenesis and synaptogenesis and repairing neuronal damage" (2025-10-30, Fj9_wLXso1c 00:20:11.480, https://youtu.be/Fj9_wLXso1c). The newer Hunter Williams library video calls it "like a that sledgehammer intervention" and says, "it's not bad. I love cerebral hyacinth. But I think there's so many steps along the way before someone really needs to run that" (2026-04-30, the-next-big-things-in-biohacking-emf-peptides-and-superhuman-performance-with-a--7d747dd0 1:10:25, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/the-next-big-things-in-biohacking-emf-peptides-and-superhuman-performance-with-a--7d747dd0/).
reset_biology_synthesis.cross_expert_disagreement: Taylor: "But, I don't think you'd have to go that far" and "I think P21 is great. I think Dihexa is great" (2026-03-14, JC1poI1OEog 00:48:24.510, https://youtu.be/JC1poI1OEog). Trevor: "The platform is always based on Tesamorelin, Cerebrolysin, GHK-Cu" (2025-10-30, Fj9_wLXso1c 00:20:05.160, https://youtu.be/Fj9_wLXso1c). Hunter's dated protocol remains on record: "10 to 20 mg per day, 5 days on, 2 days off for 8 weeks" (2026-04-18, E7GPNidicqY 01:49:46.120, https://youtu.be/E7GPNidicqY); the newer library video says, "maybe it just one cycle a year" (2026-04-30, the-next-big-things-in-biohacking-emf-peptides-and-superhuman-performance-with-a--7d747dd0 1:10:25, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/the-next-big-things-in-biohacking-emf-peptides-and-superhuman-performance-with-a--7d747dd0/).
